en.faqCurrentAnswer: We currently offer five fresh single-origin coffees: Ugandan Rwenzori Kasese as our light roast, Costa Rican Jaguar Honey as our 2026 flagship medium roast, Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed, Guatemalan Organic Highlands, and Colombian Sugarcane Decaf. Our $18 Discovery Box includes three 3.5 oz samples: Ugandan light, Costa Rican medium, and Guatemalan dark, available whole bean or ground. We also offer 16 oz bottled cold brew for $5, brewed with Guatemalan Organic Highlands. Every coffee in the lineup is specialty grade.

es.faqCurrentAnswer: Actualmente ofrecemos cinco cafés frescos de origen único: Ugandan Rwenzori Kasese como nuestro tueste claro, Costa Rican Jaguar Honey como nuestro tueste medio insignia 2026, Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed, Guatemalan Organic Highlands y Colombian Sugarcane Decaf. Nuestra Discovery Box de $18 incluye tres muestras de 3.5 oz: tueste claro de Uganda, tueste medio de Costa Rica y tueste oscuro de Guatemala, disponibles en grano entero o molido. También ofrecemos cold brew embotellado de 16 oz por $5, preparado con Guatemalan Organic Highlands. Toda la línea es de grado de especialidad.

en.heroMeta: 3.5 oz each • Ugandan Light • Costa Rican Medium • Guatemalan Dark

en.cardDescription: Three 3.5 oz coffee samples for comparing our light, medium, and dark roasts before committing to a full bag. Choose whole bean or ground.
en.cardChoice: I want to compare three distinct coffees and find the roast profile that fits me best.

en.title: Bottled Cold Brew
en.featuredAlt: Millionaire's Roast 16 oz bottled cold brew made with Guatemalan Organic Highlands dark roast coffee
en.featuredDescription: Our 16 oz bottled cold brew is brewed with Guatemalan Organic Highlands, a dark roast sourced from certified-organic small-farm cooperatives across Guatemala. Expect a smooth, balanced cup with cherry, caramel, cashew, and baker's chocolate.

es.title: Cold Brew embotellado
es.featuredAlt: Cold brew embotellado de 16 oz de Millionaire's Roast hecho con café de tueste oscuro Guatemalan Organic Highlands
es.featuredDescription: Nuestro cold brew embotellado de 16 oz se prepara con Guatemalan Organic Highlands, un tueste oscuro procedente de cooperativas de pequeñas fincas de Guatemala con certificación orgánica. Espera una taza suave y balanceada con cereza, caramelo, marañón y chocolate de repostería.

en.title: Ugandan Rwenzori Kasese
en.description: Fruit-forward 2026 Kasese natural from Kyagalanyi Coffee smallholders listed as 43% women, with raspberry, plum, brown sugar, clementine, and black tea.
en.featuredDescription: A fruit-forward 2026 natural coffee from Kasese in Uganda's Rwenzori Mountains with raspberry, plum, brown sugar, clementine, and black tea.
en.choice: I want a fruit-forward light roast with berry sweetness, clementine, and black tea.

es.title: Ugandan Rwenzori Kasese
es.description: Café natural 2026 frutal de Kasese, de pequeños productores de Kyagalanyi Coffee listados como 43% mujeres, con frambuesa, ciruela, azúcar morena, clementina y té negro.
es.featuredDescription: Un café natural 2026 frutal de Kasese, en las montañas Rwenzori de Uganda, con notas de frambuesa, ciruela, azúcar morena, clementina y té negro.
es.choice: Quiero un tueste claro frutal con dulzura de berries, clementina y té negro.

en.heroAlt: Millionaire's Roast Costa Rican Jaguar Honey coffee bag
en.featuredAlt: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey coffee bag from Millionaire's Roast
en.title: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey
en.description: Bright 2026 San Diego Mill honey lot with milk chocolate, honey, and raspberry over a clean medium roast profile.
en.featuredDescription: Our 2026 flagship medium roast is a San Diego Mill honey lot from Tarrazú with milk chocolate, honey, and raspberry in a bright, clean cup.
en.choice: I want a bright, honey-sweet cup with soft chocolate and raspberry.

es.heroAlt: Bolsa de café Costa Rican Jaguar Honey de Millionaire's Roast
es.featuredAlt: Bolsa de café Costa Rican Jaguar Honey de Millionaire's Roast
es.title: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey
es.description: Lote honey 2026 del beneficio San Diego, con chocolate con leche, miel y frambuesa sobre un perfil limpio de tueste medio.
es.featuredDescription: Nuestro tueste medio insignia 2026 es un lote honey del beneficio San Diego en Tarrazú, con notas de chocolate con leche, miel y frambuesa en una taza brillante y limpia.
es.choice: Quiero una taza brillante y dulce a miel, con chocolate suave y frambuesa.

en.title: Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed
en.description: Balanced 2026 Chonta washed coffee from Cajamarca with chocolate, green apple, plum, roasted almond, and citrus.
en.featuredDescription: A balanced 2026 washed coffee from Chonta, Cajamarca with chocolate, green apple, plum, roasted almond, and citrus.
en.choice: I want a balanced cup with chocolate, orchard fruit, and roasted almond.

es.title: Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed
es.description: Café lavado 2026 de Chonta, Cajamarca, con chocolate, manzana verde, ciruela, almendra tostada y cítricos.
es.featuredDescription: Un café lavado 2026 balanceado de Chonta, Cajamarca, con notas de chocolate, manzana verde, ciruela, almendra tostada y cítricos.
es.choice: Quiero una taza balanceada con chocolate, fruta de huerto y almendra tostada.

en.title: Guatemalan Organic Highlands
en.description: Guatemalan highlands coffee sourced from certified-organic small-farm cooperatives, fully washed and sun-dried, with cherry, caramel, cashew, and baker's chocolate.
en.featuredDescription: A Guatemalan highlands coffee sourced from certified-organic small-farm cooperatives with cherry, caramel, cashew, and baker's chocolate.
en.choice: I want a deep, balanced cup with cherry sweetness, caramel, cashew, and baker's chocolate.

es.title: Guatemalan Organic Highlands
es.description: Café de las tierras altas de Guatemala procedente de cooperativas de pequeñas fincas con certificación orgánica, lavado y secado al sol, con cereza, caramelo, marañón y chocolate de repostería.
es.featuredDescription: Un café de las tierras altas de Guatemala procedente de cooperativas de pequeñas fincas con certificación orgánica, con cereza, caramelo, marañón y chocolate de repostería.
es.choice: Quiero una taza profunda y balanceada con dulzura de cereza, caramelo, marañón y chocolate de repostería.

en.title: Colombian Sugarcane Decaf
en.description: Medium-dark sugarcane EA decaf from Valle del Cauca with milk chocolate, almond, strawberry, vanilla, and citrus.
en.featuredDescription: A bright, full-flavored 2026 sugarcane EA decaf from Valle del Cauca with milk chocolate, almond, strawberry, vanilla, and citrus.
en.choice: I want real coffee flavor without the caffeine: chocolate, almond, and bright fruit.

es.title: Colombian Sugarcane Decaf
es.description: Descafeinado sugarcane EA de Valle del Cauca con chocolate con leche, almendra, fresa, vainilla y cítricos.
es.featuredDescription: Un descafeinado sugarcane EA 2026 de Valle del Cauca, brillante y con sabor completo, con notas de chocolate con leche, almendra, fresa, vainilla y cítricos.
es.choice: Quiero sabor de café real sin cafeína: chocolate, almendra y fruta brillante.
